title: philotheca basistyla
intro: Philotheca basistyla is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the yellow-fragrant bush or lemon-scented verbena, native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Philotheca basistyla include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried herb, making it a versatile ingredient for natural remedies.
